file: What Questions To Ask Prospects During The Sales Discovery Process
brief: You see, that question helps you find out what's behind this person's why and what it's going to  do for them to bring you in to solve these problems in the company, brings out their emotions. Any why so important you now though or Cindy, can you be more specific or give me an example. That helps them relive more pain and clarify that pain in their own mind. These are very important to get your prospect to go under the surface with their answers and  tell you what's really going on in the world, like what problems do they really have and  what's causing the problems, the root cause.
sourceTitle: What Questions To Ask Prospects During The Sales Discovery Process

file: Powerful Pre-Sales: Sales Call Preparation For Consultants Who Want To Win More Clients
brief: So, what happens so often is that the consultant  will use this conversation as an opportunity to tell the buyer all about their methodology. The idea behind this is that you want to put all this information into the hands of the idea of the dream client before you actually have that conversation with them. Proof helps to essentially, right, eliminate or significantly reduce risk. All this stuff is very, very powerful in providing proof and it helps the buyer to feel less risk because there's so much proof on the table in front of them.
sourceTitle: Powerful Pre-Sales: Sales Call Preparation For Consultants Who Want To Win More Clients
